title: Dashboard loads and shows key metrics and recent activity
description: Verifies the authenticated user can open the dashboard and see business metrics and the recent activity feed.

title: New Quote quick action navigates to Create New Quote page
description: Verifies the New Quote quick action on the dashboard takes the user to the create new quote page.

title: New Client quick action navigates to Clients page
description: Verifies the New Client quick action on the dashboard takes the user to the clients list page.

title: Dashboard recent activity feed is visible and populated or empty-state is shown
description: Verifies the dashboard shows the recent activity feed section and displays either activity items or a clear empty state.

title: Dashboard retains access to quick actions after scrolling
description: Verifies that after scrolling the dashboard, the quick action buttons are still reachable and usable.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the dashboard page
Scroll to the top of the dashboard page

title: Create a new client with valid B2B/B2C fields and see it in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a client with valid contact and document fields and the client appears in the clients list.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation
Type "Cliente Teste E2E" into the client name field
Verify text "Cliente Teste E2E" is visible

title: Open an existing client detail view from the list
description: Verifies a user can open a client detail view by clicking a client row from the clients list.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation
Click on the first client row in the clients list

title: Edit a client email and verify updated details are displayed
description: Verifies a user can edit an existing client and see the updated email reflected on the client detail view.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation
Click on the first client row in the clients list

title: Validate error when creating a client with an invalid email
description: Verifies the client form shows a visible validation error and does not proceed when email format is invalid.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation
Type "Cliente Email Invalido" into the client name field

title: Delete a client from the detail view and verify it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a client and the client no longer appears in the clients list after deletion.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation
Click on the first client row in the clients list
Type "" into the client search field

title: Cancel client creation leaves the user on the clients list without creating a record
description: Verifies a user can exit the new client form without saving and returns to the clients list view.

steps.description: Click the "Clients" item in the main navigation

title: Complete quote creation form: select client, add item, configure payment, toggle warranty, and save
description: Verifies the quote form supports selecting a client, adding a line item, configuring payment options, toggling warranty, and saving successfully.

steps.description: Click the "New" or "Create Quote" entry point (e.g., "New Quote" in dashboard quick actions)
Select the first available client from the client dropdown

title: Save a quote after adding item details and verify it appears in details view
description: Verifies saving a properly filled quote leads to a visible confirmation or a quote details screen showing the entered item information.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" link in the main navigation
Select the first available client from the client dropdown
Add an item with description "Oil change", quantity "1", and unit price "100"

title: Validation: attempt to save a quote without items
description: Verifies the quote cannot be saved without at least one item and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" link in the main navigation
Select the first available client from the client dropdown

title: Filter quotes by status in pipeline/list view
description: Verifies filtering by a status updates the visible quotes list/pipeline to match the selected status filter.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" link in the main navigation
Select a specific status in the status filter (e.g., "Draft" or "Sent")

title: Open a quote from the quotes list and view quote details
description: Verifies clicking a quote row/card opens the quote details page and shows quote detail content.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" link in the main navigation
Click the first quote row/card in the quotes list or pipeline view

title: Edit an existing quote and save changes
description: Verifies a user can open edit mode for an existing quote, update fields, save, and see the updated details.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" link in the main navigation
Click the first quote row/card in the quotes list or pipeline view
Type "Updated note" into the notes or description field

title: Update company name and address and save successfully
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit company name and address on the profile page and save changes.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation
Edit the company name and address fields with new values

title: Save confirmation is shown after updating profile
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible success state after saving profile changes.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation
Edit the company name field with a new value

title: Customize proposal layout settings and save
description: Verifies a logged-in user can adjust proposal layout settings (logo size and position) and save them.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Change password from profile settings successfully
description: Verifies a logged-in user can change their password from the profile/account settings area and sees a success state.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation
Change password using valid new password values

title: Password change shows validation error when confirmation does not match
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible validation error when new password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation
Change password using mismatched new password and confirmation values
Verify text "Passwords do not match" is visible

title: Cancel subscription from profile and confirm cancellation prompt
description: Verifies a logged-in user can initiate subscription cancellation and sees a confirmation step in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the main navigation

title: Add a new service with valid name and price
description: Verifies a logged-in user can add a new service and see it appear in the service catalog.

steps.description: Type "Brake inspection" into the service name field

title: Prevent saving a service with a negative price
description: Verifies validation blocks saving when the user enters a negative price for a service.

steps.description: Type "Oil change" into the service name field

title: Edit an existing service and update its price
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit a service and see the updated price reflected in the catalog.

steps.description: Click on an existing service in the catalog

title: Cancel adding a new service does not create a catalog entry
description: Verifies dismissing the add-service form does not create a new service entry.

steps.description: Type "Temporary service" into the service name field
Verify text "Temporary service" is not visible

title: Open notification center from dashboard and see notification list
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the notification center and see a visible list of notifications.

title: Open a notification from the notification center
description: Verifies that clicking a notification opens its related content or details view.

steps.description: Click the first notification in the list

title: Mark a notification as read updates the unread badge count
description: Verifies that marking a notification as read updates the unread count badge on the bell icon.

steps.description: Verify element "unread notifications badge" is visible
Click the "Mark as read" action for the first unread notification

title: Unread badge disappears when there are no unread notifications (after marking read)
description: Verifies that when unread notifications are cleared, the unread badge is no longer visible.

steps.description: Click the "Mark all as read" button
Verify element "unread notifications badge" is not visible

title: Notification center shows empty state when there are no notifications
description: Verifies that the notification center renders a clear empty state when the list is empty.

title: Unread badge count matches number of unread items displayed
description: Verifies that the unread badge number corresponds to the number of unread notifications shown in the list.

steps.description: Verify element "unread notifications badge" is visible
Verify element "unread notification item" is visible

title: Pricing page shows plan comparison content
description: Verifies the Pricing page renders a visible plan comparison section for authenticated users.

steps.description: Click on "Pricing" in the app navigation
Verify element "pricing plans comparison" is visible

title: Profile shows subscription section for management
description: Verifies the Profile page contains a visible subscription management section for authenticated users.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Cancel subscription from Profile and confirm cancellation
description: Verifies a user can cancel their subscription from the Profile page and see a cancellation confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Cancellation confirmation is visible after canceling subscription
description: Verifies that after confirming cancellation, the UI shows a visible canceled status or confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation

title: Cancellation confirmation dialog can be dismissed without canceling
description: Verifies a user can open cancellation confirmation and then back out without completing cancellation.

steps.description: Click on "Profile" in the app navigation
Click the "Close" button on the cancellation confirmation dialog

title: Pricing upgrade button remains available when user is not yet subscribed
description: Verifies that an eligible user viewing Pricing can see and use an Upgrade button (not disabled or hidden).

steps.description: Click on "Pricing" in the app navigation
Verify text "Current plan" is not visible

title: Open global search using click entry point
description: Verifies the search can be opened via a clickable UI entry (not only keyboard shortcut).

steps.description: Click the search entry control (such as "Search" or a magnifying-glass button) in the header

title: Submit a valid support ticket and see it appear in ticket history
description: Verifies a user can submit a support ticket from the support widget and then find it in ticket history.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Tickets" option in the support widget

title: Browse FAQ by category from the support widget
description: Verifies FAQ categories can be browsed and corresponding FAQ content is displayed.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "FAQ" option in the support widget

title: Submit support ticket with type and description and confirm success message
description: Verifies the support ticket form accepts a valid type and description and shows a submission confirmation.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Contact support" option in the support widget
Select "Bug" from the ticket type dropdown

title: Submit support ticket end-to-end and verify it is listed in history
description: Verifies an end-to-end ticket submission including entering a description and then locating the ticket in ticket history.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Contact support" option in the support widget
Select "Doubt" from the ticket type dropdown

title: Validation error when submitting a support ticket without description
description: Verifies the ticket form blocks submission and shows a validation error when the description is empty.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Contact support" option in the support widget

title: Submit a feature suggestion from the support widget
description: Verifies a user can submit a feature suggestion and see a confirmation that it was submitted.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Feature suggestions" option in the support widget

title: Vote on an existing feature suggestion
description: Verifies a user can vote on a feature suggestion and the UI reflects the vote action.

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Feature suggestions" option in the support widget
Click the "Vote" button for the first visible suggestion

title: View ticket history list loads successfully
description: Verifies ticket history can be opened and shows a list area for past tickets (even if empty).

steps.description: Click the support widget button to open the support widget
Click the "Tickets" option in the support widget

title: Create a new folder from Quotes page and verify it appears
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new folder and see it listed in the Quotes area.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation

title: Create folder with empty name shows validation error
description: Verifies creating a folder without a name is blocked and a visible validation error is shown.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation

title: Rename an existing folder and verify the new name is displayed
description: Verifies a user can rename a folder and the updated folder name is visible in the folder list.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation

title: Delete a folder and verify it is no longer visible in the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a folder and it disappears from the Quotes folders list.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation

title: Cancel folder deletion leaves the folder visible
description: Verifies canceling a delete action does not remove the folder from the list.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation

title: Attempt to create a folder with only spaces shows validation error
description: Verifies whitespace-only folder names are rejected with a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Quotes" item in the main navigation
Type "   " into the folder name field

title: Invite a team member with a valid email and see a pending invite
description: Verifies a logged-in user can send an invite and the pending invite appears in the team members list.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation
Type "invitee.valid@example.com" into the invite email field

title: Invite team member with invalid email shows validation error
description: Verifies email validation prevents sending an invite and displays an error message.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation
Type "not-an-email" into the invite email field

title: View team members list on Profile page
description: Verifies the team members section is visible and can be viewed from the Profile page.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation

title: Cancel out of the invite flow without sending an invite
description: Verifies the user can open the invite UI and close it without creating a pending invite.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation

title: Attempt to invite with empty email shows required-field error
description: Verifies the invite form requires an email before submission and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation

title: Remove an existing team member from the list
description: Verifies a user can remove a team member and the removed member no longer appears in the team list.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation
Click the "Remove team member" button for "remove.me@example.com"

title: Invite a team member and ensure the invited email is shown in the pending list
description: Verifies the pending invite entry includes the invitee email after sending an invite.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation
Type "pending.check@example.com" into the invite email field

title: Prevent duplicate invite by inviting the same email twice
description: Verifies the UI shows an error (or prevents) when attempting to invite an email that is already invited.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" item in the main navigation
Type "duplicate.invite@example.com" into the invite email field
Type "duplicate.invite@example.com" into the invite email field
